prompt: Create a square cinematic album cover for a romantic indie pop song titled TWO HEARTS, ONE SUN. The scene shows two lovers as a single dark silhouette embracing and kissing or leaning forehead-to-forehead in the exact center of the frame, standing in soft wild grass by a calm sea at sunset. A huge glowing sun sits directly behind their bodies on the horizon, creating a bright golden halo that merges their silhouettes. The sky is a smooth dramatic gradient from deep navy blue at the top through violet and rose into saturated orange near the horizon, with subtle haze, lens flare orbs, and dreamy atmospheric bloom. Low dark island silhouettes appear far left and far right across the water. The foreground is shadowy, with delicate out-of-focus grasses, seed heads, and small bokeh highlights, creating depth. Use warm orange, gold, and red tones contrasted with cool blue shadows; romantic, nostalgic, cinematic, slightly painterly-photographic, soft focus, high dynamic range, no hard outlines. Add centered bottom typography: the title in widely spaced uppercase elegant sans-serif letters, glowing pale gold, and a smaller artist name beneath it reading PZF. Keep the composition minimal and symmetrical, with the couple and sun perfectly aligned, no extra people, no buildings, no border, no watermark.
